channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BIOCON] Biocon Pharma Receives U.S. FDA Approval for Liraglutide Injection
item.description:
Biocon Pharma Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Biocon Ltd, has received approval from the U.S Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) for its ANDA for Liraglutide Injection (gVictoza®), 18 mg/3 mL (6 mg/mL), Single-Patient-Use Prefilled Pens. This approval is for the treatment of insufficiently controlled Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus in adults, adolescents and children aged 10 years and above, as an adjunct to diet and exercise. This follows the approval for Liraglutide injection (gSaxenda®) that was received by the Company on February 24, 2026, and will further strengthen Biocon’s portfolio of vertically integrated, complex drug products.

  • Biocon Pharma received U.S. FDA approval for Liraglutide Injection (gVictoza®)
  • Liraglutide Injection is indicated for the treatment of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus in adults, adolescents and children aged 10 years and above
  • This approval strengthens Biocon’s portfolio of vertically integrated, complex drug products
  • The approval follows the previous approval for Liraglutide injection (gSaxenda®) on February 24, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIOCON LTD. | Category: USFDA

item.title: [NHIT] National Highways Infra Trust Passes All Resolutions in EOM with Required Majority
item.description:
🔥 Trending

National Highways Infra Trust held its 6th Extra-Ordinary Meeting on 12th March 2026 through Video Conferencing. The meeting was attended by Directors, KMPs, Leadership team, Invitees, and 4 Unitholders representing 2 client IDs. The meeting was held in compliance with SEBI InvIT Regulations and SEBI Circulars. The resolutions passed include approval for acquisition of assets, issuance of units on a preferential basis, issuance of units through Institutional Placement, distribution to Unitholders, variation in terms of use of proceeds, and revision in remuneration to statutory auditors. The e-voting process commenced at 11.00 a.m. (IST) and concluded at 11:30 (IST). The Scrutinizer submitted his report, stating that all resolutions were passed with the requisite majority as required under the SEBI InvIT Regulations.

  • National Highways Infra Trust passed all resolutions in EOM with required majority
  • Meeting held through Video Conferencing in compliance with SEBI InvIT Regulations and SEBI Circulars
  • Resolutions included approval for acquisition of assets, issuance of units, distribution to Unitholders, variation in terms of use of proceeds, and revision in remuneration to statutory auditors

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Highways Infra Trust | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AMBUJACEM] Ambuja Cements Ltd Fixes Record Date for Scheme of Arrangement with Sanghi Industries Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ambuja Cements Ltd has announced the effectiveness of the Scheme of Arrangement between itself and Sanghi Industries Limited. The scheme was sanctioned by the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench on February 9, 2026. The companies have complied with all conditions specified in the scheme, resulting in the amalgamation of Sanghi Industries Limited with Ambuja Cements Limited and the dissolution of Sanghi Industries Limited without being wound up. The equity shareholders of Sanghi Industries Limited whose names appear in the Register of Members as of April 6, 2026 will be entitled for allotment of equity shares of Ambuja Cements Limited.

  • Scheme of Arrangement between Ambuja Cements Limited and Sanghi Industries Limited has been sanctioned by the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench.
  • Sanghi Industries Limited stands amalgamated with Ambuja Cements Limited and dissolved without being wound up.
  • Equity shareholders of Sanghi Industries Limited will be entitled for allotment of equity shares of Ambuja Cements Limited.
  • The effectiveness of the scheme has been complied with all conditions specified in Clause 3.3 of the Scheme.
  • The Appointed Date of the Scheme is April 1, 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMBUJA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Second Phase of 33.335 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd, through its subsidiary ACME Sun Power Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the second phase of 33.335 MW/160.51 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh capacity of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project. The project is located at Village: Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for this phase is March 14, 2026. With this, ACME Sun Power Private Limited has achieved a commissioned capacity of 66.67 MW / 320.99 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Ltd commissions the second phase of 33.335 MW/160.51 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh capacity of BESS Project.
  • The project is located in Rajasthan, specifically at Village: Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur.
  • The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the second phase is March 14, 2026.
  • ACME Sun Power Private Limited has achieved a commissioned capacity of 66.67 MW / 320.99 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh.
  • The BESS project is a significant step towards sustainable energy storage.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [AMBUJACEM] Ambuja Cements Ltd Announces Effectiveness of Scheme of Arrangement with Sanghi Industries Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ambuja Cements Ltd has announced the effectiveness of the Scheme of Arrangement between Sanghi Industries Ltd and Ambuja Cements Ltd. The scheme has been sanctioned by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench and the certified copy of the order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad, Gujarat. The scheme has become effective from March 12, 2026, and consequently, Sanghi Industries Ltd stands amalgamated with Ambuja Cements Ltd and dissolved without being wound up. The equity shareholders of Sanghi Industries Ltd whose name appears in the Register of Members of the company as on April 6, 2026, will be entitled for allotment of equity shares of Ambuja Cements Ltd.

  • Scheme of Arrangement between Ambuja Cements Ltd and Sanghi Industries Ltd sanctioned by the National Company Law Tribunal.
  • Certified copy of the order filed with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad, Gujarat.
  • Scheme became effective from March 12, 2026.
  • Sanghi Industries Ltd stands amalgamated with Ambuja Cements Ltd and dissolved without being wound up.
  • Equity shareholders of Sanghi Industries Ltd entitled for allotment of equity shares of Ambuja Cements Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMBUJA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [KALPATARU] Kalpataru Ltd. Signs Rs. 1,400 Cr. Redevelopment Project in Andheri West
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kalpataru Ltd., a leading developer in Mumbai Metropolitan Region (MMR), has announced the signing of a prestigious redevelopment project of Shree Mahalakshmi CHS at a prime location off Veera Desai Road, Andheri West. The project spans ~3 acres of prime land with a total potential ~0.4 msf carpet area and estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of around Rs. 1,400 cr. The fully residential development will offer thoughtfully planned residences designed to support contemporary lifestyles, with an emphasis on sustainability, modern amenities, and seamless connectivity.

  • Kalpataru Ltd. has signed a redevelopment project in Andheri West with an estimated GDV of around Rs. 1,400 cr.
  • The project spans ~3 acres of prime land with a total potential ~0.4 msf carpet area.
  • The project is strategically located in Andheri West, one of Mumbai’s most established residential and commercial micro-markets.
  • The fully residential development will offer thoughtfully planned residences designed to support contemporary lifestyles.
  • Kalpataru Limited is a leading developer in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with a focus on luxury, premium, and aspirational residential, commercial, and retail projects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kalpataru Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [NHIT] National Highways Infra Trust to Consider and Approve Standalone Balance Sheet and Distributions for January 2026
item.description:
National Highways Infra Trust has informed the Exchange about a scheduled board meeting on 16th March, 2026. The meeting will consider and approve the un-audited Standalone Balance Sheet, Profit and Loss, Cash Flow and Net Distributable Cash Flows of NHIT for the period ended 31st January, 2026. The board will also consider the declaration of distributions, if any, to Unitholders for the month of January, 2026.

  • National Highways Infra Trust to consider and approve un-audited Standalone Balance Sheet for the period ended 31st January, 2026
  • Board to approve the Profit and Loss, Cash Flow and Net Distributable Cash Flows of NHIT
  • Declaration of distributions, if any, to Unitholders for the month of January, 2026 will be considered

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: National Highways Infra Trust | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SANGHIIND] Sanghi Industries Ltd Amalgamated with Ambuja Cements Ltd, Record Date Fixed for Share Swap
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sanghi Industries Ltd has announced the effectiveness of the Scheme of Arrangement with Ambuja Cements Ltd. The companies have complied with all conditions and the Scheme has become effective from March 12, 2026. The Finance Committee of Sanghi Industries Ltd has approved April 6, 2026 as the Record Date for determining the shareholders whose equity shares will stand cancelled and to whom the new equity shares of Ambuja Cements Ltd will be issued as per the Swap Ratio set out in the Scheme.

  • Sanghi Industries Ltd and Ambuja Cements Ltd Scheme of Arrangement has become effective from March 12, 2026.
  • The Finance Committee of Sanghi Industries Ltd has approved April 6, 2026 as the Record Date for share swap.
  • The equity shares of the shareholders of Sanghi Industries Ltd will be cancelled and new equity shares of Ambuja Cements Ltd will be issued as per the Swap Ratio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SANGHI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [AXISOL] Axis Solutions Ltd Executes Loan Agreement of Rs. 20 Crores with The Hongkong And Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Axis Solutions Limited has executed a Deed of Hypothecation with The Hongkong And Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited on 12th March, 2026. The loan agreement is worth Rs. 20.00 crores, which will be used to expand the operations of the business. The significant terms of the agreement include a personal guarantee from Mr. Bijal Sanghvi and Mrs. Purvi B Sanghvi, first pari-passu charge on current and future current assets, first pari-passu charge on industrial property, and a Deposit Under Lien (DUL) for INR 1.2 Mn.

  • Loan agreement worth Rs. 20.00 crores
  • Loan agreement executed with The Hongkong And Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited
  • Loan to be used for expanding business operations
  • Includes personal guarantee, pari-passu charge on assets, and DUL

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Axis Solutions Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [SANGHIIND] Sanghi Industries Amalgamated with Ambuja Cements: Scheme of Arrangement Sanctioned and Effective
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sanghi Industries Limited has announced the effectiveness of the Scheme of Arrangement between the company and Ambuja Cements Limited. The Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench sanctioned the scheme on February 9, 2026, and the certified copy of the NCLT Order was filed with the Registrar of Companies, Ahmedabad, Gujarat on March 12, 2026. The scheme has become effective on the same date, resulting in the amalgamation of Sanghi Industries with Ambuja Cements and the dissolution of Sanghi Industries without being wound up. The Appointed Date of the Scheme is April 1, 2024, and the Record Date for determining the shareholders of the company whose equity shares will stand cancelled and to whom the new equity shares of Ambuja Cements will be issued as per the Swap Ratio set out in the Scheme is April 6, 2026.

  • Sanghi Industries Limited and Ambuja Cements Limited Scheme of Arrangement sanctioned by the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench.
  • Scheme became effective on March 12, 2026, leading to the amalgamation of Sanghi Industries with Ambuja Cements and the dissolution of Sanghi Industries.
  • Appointed Date of the Scheme is April 1, 2024.
  • Record Date for determining shareholders and issuing new equity shares set to April 6, 2026.
  • All required documents have been filed and posted on the Sanghi Industries Limited website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SANGHI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Merger
